title: Bloomberg Market Data
description: Represents market data for a Bloomberg security, including real-time price data, trading volume, and market indicators. This schema covers the most commonly used Bloomberg market data fields delivered through BLPAPI subscriptions and reference data requests.

lastPrice.description: Last traded price (Bloomberg field: LAST_PRICE / PX_LAST).

bid.description: Current best bid price (Bloomberg field: BID).

ask.description: Current best ask price (Bloomberg field: ASK).

mid.description: Mid price between bid and ask (Bloomberg field: MID).

open.description: Opening price for the current session (Bloomberg field: OPEN / PX_OPEN).

high.description: Session high price (Bloomberg field: HIGH / PX_HIGH).

low.description: Session low price (Bloomberg field: LOW / PX_LOW).

close.description: Previous session closing price (Bloomberg field: PX_CLOSE_1D).

volume.description: Total trading volume for the current session (Bloomberg field: VOLUME / PX_VOLUME).

bidSize.description: Size at the best bid price (Bloomberg field: BID_SIZE).

askSize.description: Size at the best ask price (Bloomberg field: ASK_SIZE).

tradeSize.description: Size of the last trade (Bloomberg field: TRADE_SIZE).

lastTradeTime.description: Timestamp of the last trade (Bloomberg field: LAST_TRADE_TIME).

netChange.description: Net change from previous close (Bloomberg field: CHG_NET_1D).

percentChange.description: Percent change from previous close (Bloomberg field: CHG_PCT_1D).

numTrades.description: Number of trades in the session (Bloomberg field: NUM_TRADES).

previousClose.description: Previous session close price (Bloomberg field: PREV_CLOSE_VALUE_DT).

date.description: Date of the market data record.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the data was generated or received.
